data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_LIGHTWEIGHT: {"version":1,"epicId":"0b6c-08ba","generatedAt":"2026-04-11T15:42:36Z","generatedBy":"preplanning-lightweight","epic":{"title":"Add preplanning.interactive config key to enable/disable interactive mode","description":"Automation agents and pipelines that invoke preplanning programmatically are blocked today because preplanning pauses at six checkpoints waiting for human input.","successCriteria":["A preplanning.interactive boolean key (absent or false = non-interactive; true = interactive) is read at preplanning startup via read-config.sh and governs all interactive checkpoints","In non-interactive mode, all interactive checkpoints have defined non-blocking behavior (6 checkpoints + ui-designer dispatch)","CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md and workflow-config-schema.json document preplanning.interactive with per-checkpoint behavior table and migration note","/dso:onboarding asks whether the project should use interactive preplanning and writes preplanning.interactive to the generated config accordingly","This project .claude/dso-config.conf sets preplanning.interactive=false explicitly","Automated preplanning invocation with preplanning.interactive absent or false completes end-to-end without pausing; tests for all six fallbacks pass"]},"stories":[],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":0,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":[]},"considerations":["[Testing] Tests must cover all 6 non-interactive fallback behaviors including Delete-in-reconciliation edge case","[Reliability] Auto-approval of reconciliation applies unconditionally including Delete \u2014 guard against closing in-progress stories","[Maintainability] PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE flag accessed at 6-7 checkpoints \u2014 read once at startup, pass as parameter"]}
